bargaining_unit_name: Newark Firefighters Union, Inc. binding_arbitration_statute: New Jersey Employer-Employee Relations Act (N.J.S.A. 34:13A-1 et seq., Ch. 13A)

This 2013-2015 cycle does NOT overlap the already-ingested Newark non-safety row (2020-2023); it fills an occupation-coverage gap (exploratory adjacent match), consistent with how Philadelphia fire (2017-2020) was treated in the prior ingestion wave.
